testcase.name: Task1: Genre Growth Analysis should find the correct top 5 genres with growth
Task2: Genre Ratings by Decade should calculate correct weighted averages per decade
Task3: Top Directors should find directors with highest rated films

failure.message: List((a,1.0)) had length 1 instead of expected length 2

testcase.name: Task4: Prolific Crew Members should identify top contributors across time periods

failure.message: List((a,1)) had length 1 instead of expected length 10
